name: Supabase Auth
description: Supabase Auth REST API for user authentication and management. Sign up and sign in users with email/password or magic links, manage sessions with JWT tokens, handle password resets, and retrieve or update user profiles. Built on GoTrue.

capabilities.name: sign_up
capabilities.description: Create a new user account with email and password. Returns the user object and a session with access and refresh tokens.

capabilities.name: sign_in_password
capabilities.description: Sign in an existing user with email and password. Returns a session with JWT access token and refresh token.

capabilities.name: sign_in_otp
capabilities.description: Send a magic link or OTP code to the user's email or phone number for passwordless authentication.

capabilities.name: refresh_token
capabilities.description: Exchange a refresh token for a new access token and refresh token pair. Use this to maintain user sessions without re-authentication.

capabilities.name: get_user
capabilities.description: Retrieve the currently authenticated user's profile using their JWT access token. Returns email, metadata, and identity providers.

capabilities.name: update_user
capabilities.description: Update the authenticated user's profile attributes including email, password, phone, and custom user metadata.

capabilities.name: sign_out
capabilities.description: Sign out the currently authenticated user by invalidating their JWT token on the server side.

capabilities.name: send_password_reset
capabilities.description: Send a password reset email to the specified email address. The email contains a link that redirects the user to reset their password.
